name: Turkey Tropicale
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Turkey parts, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat the turkey pieces with the chicken coating mix according to package directions.
2. Arrange the turkey in a single layer in an 8 inch baking dish.
3. Bake uncovered at 400°F for 40 minutes.
4. In a medium skillet, melt butter over medium heat.
5. Add brown sugar and stir constantly until melted.
6. Stir in orange juice and rum with cornstarch; whisk together.
7. Gradually add the mixture to the sugar mixture, stirring constantly.
8. Bring sauce to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until thick and clear (about 3 minutes).
9. Add bananas and cook for about 1 minute.
10. Place turkey on serving plates.
11. Pour banana sauce over the turkey and serve. Makes 4 servings.
